questions.text: Using your capstone project (or a hypothetical MST dApp idea you have defined), write a complete grant proposal following the initGrant template. Your proposal must include all seven sections (Executive Summary, Problem Statement, Solution & Technical Approach, Team, Milestones & Timeline, Budget, Appendix). Submit as a single PDF document.
questions.explanation: 📊 Assessment Rubric - How Your Proposal Will Be Graded
questions.modelAnswer:
📊 Assessment Rubric - How Your Proposal Will Be Graded
Section Criteria for Full Marks Marks
1. Executive Summary Crisp 150 - 200 word summary covering problem, solution, ask, and impact. The reviewer instantly understands what you are building and why. 5
2. Problem Statement Specific stakeholder identified; pain quantified with data or reasonable estimate; current solutions critiqued with evidence; urgency established. 8
3. Solution & Technical Approach Architecture diagram included; smart contract specification (at least 2 contracts described); MST-specific features explicitly referenced and justified; current prototype status honestly stated. 10
4. Team & Qualifications All team members listed with roles; GitHub/LinkedIn links provided; relevant experience described; if solo, mitigation plan for single-point-of-failure addressed. 5
5. Milestones & Timeline 4 - 6 milestones defined with verifiable deliverables; timeline realistic (8 - 12 weeks for initGrant); each milestone has a clear success metric. 6
6. Budget & Justification Line-item budget with justifications for each expense; total does not exceed $1,000 (initGrant cap); budget items match initGrant-eligible expenses. 4
7. Appendix & Polish At least one supporting material included (demo video link, Figma, GitHub, or letter of intent); proposal is free of typos, well-formatted, and easy to navigate. 2
Examiner note: The proposal will be evaluated as if it were a real initGrant application. The committee is looking for clarity, feasibility, and evidence of preparation - not perfection. A proposal that honestly acknowledges gaps but shows a plan to address them scores higher than one that pretends everything is perfect.
